title: Savory Spring Argentinian Beef Skewers
description: A festive and flavorful Argentinian dish featuring tender beef, infused with the bold flavors of mustard and Sichuan pepper, perfect for spring gatherings.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, Dijon mustard, toasted Sichuan pepper, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the beef cubes to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinade.
Thread the marinated beef cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the beef reaches an internal temperature of 135 degrees Fahrenheit for medium-rare.
Transfer the skewers to a plate and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Drizzle with lemon juice and serve immediately.
Let the skewers rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the juices to redistribute.
